changes.value:
File: swissarmyhammer-code-context/src/lsp_communication.rs (60.3%, 126 uncovered lines)

Uncovered functions:
- `collect_and_persist_file_symbols()` (lines 351-388): symbol collection with DB persistence and error paths
- `initialize()` (lines 391-418): LSP initialize request with error response handling
- `shutdown()` (lines 520-537): shutdown + exit notification
- `collect_call_edges()` (lines 543-626): call hierarchy prepare, outgoing calls, edge collection
- `collect_and_persist_call_edges()` (lines 629-639): edge persistence
- `read_jsonrpc_response()` (lines 751-789): Content-Length header parsing, EOF, body read
- `parse_call_hierarchy_items()` (lines 644-660): parse error/null/array
- `parse_outgoing_calls()` (lines 663-679): parse error/null/array

Tests needed:
- Unit tests for read_jsonrpc_response with valid/invalid/EOF input
- Unit tests for parse_call_hierarchy_items, parse_outgoing_calls
- Integration test for initialize/shutdown with mock stdio

Acceptance: coverage >= 70% for lsp_communication.rs
Test LSP communication: call hierarchy, shutdown, JSON-RPC framing
